assertions.title: Unified Table Shows All Pending Transactions

steps.expected: All pending transactions visible including PA1 and PA2
steps.observed: Table shows 7 transactions: 5 PA1 and 2 PA2. Both statuses visible in unified view.

assertions.title: Status Filter Functions Correctly

steps.observed: 2 PA2 items displayed correctly with no duplicates after code fix
7 total items (5 PA1 + 2 PA2) displayed correctly

assertions.issues: Previously failed due to PA2 duplicates when filtering to PA2. Fixed in DashboardApprovalPage.tsx by only fetching PA2 separately when statusFilter is 'all'.

assertions.title: Navigation to Module Works

steps.action: Click Bank module badge in table row
steps.expected: Navigation to Bank module list page
steps.observed: Page navigated to Bank module showing Bank transactions

steps.action: Verify module page shows related transactions
steps.observed: 3 Bank transactions displayed in Bank module list

assertions.issues: Previously failed because onNavigateToKas/Bank/Gudang props were not passed from App.tsx. Fixed by adding the navigation props to both DashboardApprovalPage instances in App.tsx.

assertions.title: Mobile Responsiveness

steps.expected: Table horizontal scrolls, cards stack vertically, buttons tappable, text readable
steps.observed: Page loads successfully and table appears scrollable. Action buttons remain visible. However, summary cards remain in 2-column grid instead of stacking into a single column.

assertions.issues: Summary cards use grid-cols-2 on all screen sizes. For full mobile compliance, should use grid-cols-1 on small screens (sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4).

assertions.title: Accessibility

steps.action: Test keyboard tab navigation through dashboard elements
steps.expected: All interactive elements reachable via keyboard
steps.observed: Sidebar buttons, filters, search box, and action buttons are all reachable via Tab key.

assertions.issues: Basic keyboard navigation verified, but comprehensive WCAG AA compliance (color contrast, ARIA labels, screen reader behavior) requires Lighthouse or axe-core which are not available in the current toolset.

assertions.title: Error Handling

steps.action: Review error handling in DashboardApprovalPage.tsx loadPendingApprovals and loadCounts
steps.expected: User-facing error UI with retry button, friendly messages, per-module failure indicators
steps.observed: Errors are caught in try-catch blocks and only logged to console.error. No error state is set or displayed to the user.

assertions.issues: Code review confirms missing error handling UI. loadPendingApprovals and loadCounts catch errors and log them but do not render any retry button, friendly message, or module-specific failure indicator.

frictions.description: agent-browser fill command timed out on Electron login textboxes; required React-compatible input setter via eval
frictions.resolution: Used Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor to set input values and dispatch input/change events for React state binding

summary: Round 2 tested 6 assertions. 3 previously-failed assertions now pass after code fixes (VAL-DASH-003, VAL-DASH-005, VAL-DASH-009). 1 assertion failed due to mobile grid not stacking (VAL-DASH-018). 1 assertion failed due to missing error handling UI (VAL-DASH-020). 1 assertion remains blocked for tool availability (VAL-DASH-019).
